name: Savoy Wedges with Cheese Sauce (Kxmt69b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage into six wedges.
2. Place the cabbage wedges in a microwave-safe baking dish.
3. Add 2 tablespoons water and sprinkle lightly with salt.
4. Cover the dish with microwave-safe plastic wrap.
5. Microwave on high power (100%) for 9 to 12 minutes, or until tender. Turn the wedges over once during cooking and give the dish a half turn.
6. Drain the cabbage, leaving the cover on to keep it warm.
7. In a 2-cup glass measure, combine the cornstarch, paprika, garlic salt, and white pepper.
8. Add milk and cook uncovered on high for 3 to 4 minutes, or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
9. Stir in the shredded Swiss cheese until melted.
10. Spoon the sauce over the cabbage and sprinkle with fresh dillweed.
Each Serving: 70 Calories, 6g protein, 7g Carbohydrate, 2g Fat, 9mg Cholesterol, 139mg Sodium.
